strengths: Strong Python and SQL hands-on experience

improvement_bullets: Leveraged predictive modeling techniques such as logistic regression and decision trees within Python to analyze high-value customer segments, contributing to a 300% increase in acquisition.
Performed rigorous statistical analysis on operational data, including multivariate analysis and feature engineering, to identify process bottlenecks and improve team efficiency by 25%.
Applied machine learning methodologies to historical lending data, building predictive risk models that evaluated borrower default probabilities and segmented populations by risk profile.
Translated complex workforce-related performance data into actionable HR analytics insights, utilizing Power BI to visualize key metrics that supported executive-level decision-making.
Utilized R and Python to execute data mining tasks on large-scale datasets, ensuring data integrity through validation checks and advanced statistical normalization techniques.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Predictive Analytics Analyst opportunity with NYU Langone Health. I am interested in this role because I am passionate about applying rigorous data science and statistical methods to improve workforce outcomes within a world-class healthcare environment. What interests me about working for NYU Langone Health is its consistent ranking as a top comprehensive academic medical center, which demonstrates a clear commitment to excellence and innovation that inspires me to contribute my analytical expertise to your mission. I believe my proficiency in building end-to-end data pipelines and my background in predictive modeling would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw, complex data into strategic business advantages. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I designed time-series models to identify high-value customer segments and automated reporting workflows, which enabled the company to reallocate resources effectively and drove a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Predictive Analytics Analyst role at NYU Langone Health would allow me to bring my experience in feature engineering and statistical modeling to your workforce planning initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my data storytelling skills. I conducted an analysis of a 250k+ row arrest dataset, where I used Python and NumPy to identify demographic patterns and presented my findings through an interactive Tableau dashboard, resulting in actionable recommendations for stakeholders. I am excited by the opportunity to use my machine learning and Python skills in working on predictive modeling at NYU Langone Health. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data-driven decision-making align with what it takes to succeed at the Predictive Analytics Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
